findings.message: Consumer pact generated by pact.write_file(Path("pacts")) is not committed to the repository; the demo-inventory pact is ephemeral and not available for provider verification. The provider test only verifies against pacts/examplewebapp-app.json, leaving this contract unverified.
findings.suggestion: Commit the generated pacts/demo-inventory.json file to version control and add it to the provider verification test so the provider CI can verify compatibility with this consumer's expectations.
